rulesVersion.changeNotes: Seeded with 64-card Action deck and 150 imported Artists.

muses.name: Calliope
muses.description: The eldest and chief of the Muses, Calliope inspires epic poetry, grand storytelling, and eloquent speech. She is often depicted with a writing tablet or scroll, and her beautiful voice is said to stir kings and poets alike to greatness. In myth, she is the mother of Orpheus and the muse most often invoked for heroic tales.

muses.name: Clio
muses.description: Muse of history and the recorder of great deeds, Clio inspires the chroniclers, historians, and storytellers who preserve the memory of humanity. She is often shown with scrolls or books, and a laurel wreath, symbolizing the triumph of knowledge over time.

muses.name: Erato
muses.description: The Muse of lyric and erotic poetry, Erato inspires songs of love, romance, and longing. Her name means "the lovely one," and she is often depicted with a lyre or a cithara and a wreath of roses, guiding poets to create verses that stir the heart.

muses.name: Euterpe
muses.description: The Giver of Pleasure, Euterpe inspires musicians and composers, her divine influence often evoking harmony and delight. She is associated with wind instruments, especially the flute, through which her spirit of joy and melody flows.

muses.name: Melpomene
muses.description: The Muse of tragedy, Melpomene inspires profound and moving works exploring sorrow, fate, and the depths of the human soul. She is depicted with a tragic mask and a cypress wreath, embodying beauty in melancholy and catharsis.

muses.name: Polyhymnia
muses.description: Muse of sacred hymns, meditation, and geometry, Polyhymnia inspires works of devotion, contemplation, and solemnity. She is portrayed as thoughtful and veiled, sometimes holding a lyre or agricultural symbols, representing the deep roots of faith and wisdom.

muses.name: Terpsichore
muses.description: The one who delights in dance, Terpsichore inspires dancers, choreographers, and creators of light verse. She is often shown seated with a lyre, embodying rhythm, movement, and the joy of creative expression through the body.

muses.name: Thalia
muses.description: Thalia, Muse of comedy and pastoral poetry, brings laughter, wit, and celebration. She is depicted with a comic mask, an ivy crown, and sometimes a shepherd's crook, encouraging merriment and the lighter side of creativity.

muses.name: Urania
muses.description: Urania, Muse of astronomy, mathematics, and sciences, inspires those who seek to unravel the mysteries of the cosmos and the laws that govern it.

epochs.name: 1980s Neon Dreams
epochs.description: Roller discos, synth anthems, and neon dreams on the dance floor.
epochs.flavorText: Roller discos, synth anthems, and neon dreams on the dance floor.

actions.name: Focused Creation
actions.effectText: Draw 2 Artist cards. You may play 1 immediately if it matches an Epoch.
actions.rulesText: Draw 2 Artist cards. You may play 1 immediately if it matches an Epoch.

actions.name: Perfect Alignment
actions.effectText: Draw 1 Artist. If it matches your tableau, play it and draw 1 more.
actions.rulesText: Draw 1 Artist. If it matches your tableau, play it and draw 1 more.

actions.name: Inspired Archive
actions.effectText: Look at top 3 Artist cards. Keep 1, discard the rest.
actions.rulesText: Look at top 3 Artist cards. Keep 1, discard the rest.

actions.name: Hidden Vault
actions.effectText: Search the deck for 1 Artist. Shuffle afterwards.
actions.rulesText: Search the deck for 1 Artist. Shuffle afterwards.

actions.name: Epoch Bloom
actions.effectText: Draw 2 Epochs. Keep 1, return 1 to bottom.
actions.rulesText: Draw 2 Epochs. Keep 1, return 1 to bottom.

actions.name: Timeless Glimpse
actions.effectText: Look at top 3 Epochs. Keep 1, shuffle the rest.
actions.rulesText: Look at top 3 Epochs. Keep 1, shuffle the rest.

actions.name: Creative Torrent
actions.effectText: Draw 2 Artists. You may play 1.
actions.rulesText: Draw 2 Artists. You may play 1.

actions.name: Cascading Vision
actions.effectText: Draw 1 Artist and 1 Epoch. If both can be played, draw 1 more Artist.
actions.rulesText: Draw 1 Artist and 1 Epoch. If both can be played, draw 1 more Artist.

actions.name: Memory Sketch
actions.effectText: Look at top 3 Epochs. Reorder them.
actions.rulesText: Look at top 3 Epochs. Reorder them.

actions.name: Visionary Flash
actions.effectText: Draw 1 Artist and 1 Action. You may play the Action immediately.
actions.rulesText: Draw 1 Artist and 1 Action. You may play the Action immediately.

actions.name: Flash of Genius
actions.effectText: Play 2 Artist cards this turn.
actions.rulesText: Play 2 Artist cards this turn.

actions.name: Second Verse
actions.effectText: Play 1 Artist, then draw 1 Artist.
actions.rulesText: Play 1 Artist, then draw 1 Artist.

actions.name: Muse’s Surge
actions.effectText: Your next Artist this turn gains +1 point.
actions.rulesText: Your next Artist this turn gains +1 point.

actions.name: Muse’s Favour
actions.effectText: Double the value of the next Artist you play.
actions.rulesText: Double the value of the next Artist you play.

actions.name: Creative Guard
actions.effectText: Protect 1 Artist from being stolen or swapped.
actions.rulesText: Protect 1 Artist from being stolen or swapped.

actions.name: Muse’s Immunity
actions.effectText: Protect 1 card until your next turn.
actions.rulesText: Protect 1 card until your next turn.

actions.name: Recovered Inspiration
actions.effectText: Take 1 Artist and 1 Epoch from discard.
actions.rulesText: Take 1 Artist and 1 Epoch from discard.

actions.name: Heirloom Reclaimed
actions.effectText: Take 1 card (Artist or Epoch) from discard.
actions.rulesText: Take 1 card (Artist or Epoch) from discard.

actions.name: Sacred Inspiration
actions.effectText: If your Muse matches, gain +2 points. Otherwise, draw 2 cards.
actions.rulesText: If your Muse matches, gain +2 points. Otherwise, draw 2 cards.

actions.name: Echoing Muse
actions.effectText: If your Muse matches, play 1 extra Artist. Otherwise, draw 2 Artists.
actions.rulesText: If your Muse matches, play 1 extra Artist. Otherwise, draw 2 Artists.

actions.name: Divine Focus
actions.effectText: If your Muse matches, search deck for 1 Artist. Otherwise, draw 2.
actions.rulesText: If your Muse matches, search deck for 1 Artist. Otherwise, draw 2.

actions.name: Inspired Balance
actions.effectText: Discard up to 2 cards, draw the same number +1.
actions.rulesText: Discard up to 2 cards, draw the same number +1.

actions.name: Chorus of Echoes
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Discard 1 Artist, 2 Draw 1 Artist, 3 Play 1 Artist, 4 Play 1 Artist, 5 Recover 1 Artist, 6 Play 2 Artists
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Discard 1 Artist, 2 Draw 1 Artist, 3 Play 1 Artist, 4 Play 1 Artist, 5 Recover 1 Artist, 6 Play 2 Artists

actions.name: Divine Inspiration
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Draw + discard, 2 Play Action, 3 Draw 1, 4 Draw 2 + play 1, 5 Search Artist + play, 6 Draw + play Artist
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Draw + discard, 2 Play Action, 3 Draw 1, 4 Draw 2 + play 1, 5 Search Artist + play, 6 Draw + play Artist

actions.name: Fractured Canvas
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Return Artist to hand, 2 Swap with discard, 3 Steal from hand, 4 Swap tableau/hand, 5 Draw 2 discard 1, 6 Draw 2
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Return Artist to hand, 2 Swap with discard, 3 Steal from hand, 4 Swap tableau/hand, 5 Draw 2 discard 1, 6 Draw 2

actions.name: Twists of Fate
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Discard 1, 2 Draw Artist, 3 Draw Epoch, 4 Play Artist, 5 Recover Artist, 6 Play 2 Artists
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Discard 1, 2 Draw Artist, 3 Draw Epoch, 4 Play Artist, 5 Recover Artist, 6 Play 2 Artists

actions.name: Muse’s Gamble
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Lose random card, 2 Draw 2 Artists, 3 Play Artist, 4 Swap with discard, 5 Steal Artist, 6 Double next Artist
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Lose random card, 2 Draw 2 Artists, 3 Play Artist, 4 Swap with discard, 5 Steal Artist, 6 Double next Artist

actions.name: Temporal Flux
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Discard Epoch, 2 Draw 2 Epochs, 3 Swap Epoch, 4 Play Epoch + Artist, 5 Recover Epoch, 6 Play extra Artist
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Discard Epoch, 2 Draw 2 Epochs, 3 Swap Epoch, 4 Play Epoch + Artist, 5 Recover Epoch, 6 Play extra Artist

actions.name: Creative Surge Roll
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Nothing, 2 Draw 1, 3 Draw 2, 4 Play Artist, 5 Play 2 Artists, 6 Play 2 + draw 1
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Nothing, 2 Draw 1, 3 Draw 2, 4 Play Artist, 5 Play 2 Artists, 6 Play 2 + draw 1

actions.name: Unstable Inspiration
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Discard 1, 2 Draw 1, 3 Swap discard, 4 Play Artist, 5 Steal Artist, 6 Double score
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Discard 1, 2 Draw 1, 3 Swap discard, 4 Play Artist, 5 Steal Artist, 6 Double score

actions.name: Rhythm of Chance
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Skip Artist, 2 Draw 1, 3 Draw 2, 4 Play Artist, 5 Recover Artist, 6 Play 2 Artists
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Skip Artist, 2 Draw 1, 3 Draw 2, 4 Play Artist, 5 Recover Artist, 6 Play 2 Artists

actions.name: Fate’s Whisper
actions.effectText: Roll: 1 Reveal hand, 2 Draw 1, 3 Draw 2, 4 Play Artist, 5 Steal Artist, 6 Play +1 bonus
actions.rulesText: Roll: 1 Reveal hand, 2 Draw 1, 3 Draw 2, 4 Play Artist, 5 Steal Artist, 6 Play +1 bonus

actions.name: Art Critic
actions.effectText: Cancel an Action.
actions.rulesText: Cancel an Action.

actions.name: Slip of the Hand
actions.effectText: Target player discards 1 random card.
actions.rulesText: Target player discards 1 random card.

actions.name: Missed Cue
actions.effectText: Target player cannot play an Artist this turn.
actions.rulesText: Target player cannot play an Artist this turn.

actions.name: Return to Draft
actions.effectText: Return 1 tableau Artist to owner’s hand.
actions.rulesText: Return 1 tableau Artist to owner’s hand.

actions.name: Dim the Spotlight
actions.effectText: Player with most cards discards 1.
actions.rulesText: Player with most cards discards 1.

actions.name: Echo of Doubt
actions.effectText: Remove 1 random Artist from hand (discard).
actions.rulesText: Remove 1 random Artist from hand (discard).

actions.name: Lost in the Moment
actions.effectText: Target player discards 1 tableau Artist (their choice).
actions.rulesText: Target player discards 1 tableau Artist (their choice).

actions.name: Stage Fright
actions.effectText: Target player cannot play an Action next turn.
actions.rulesText: Target player cannot play an Action next turn.

actions.name: Time Ripple
actions.effectText: Target player cannot play an Epoch this turn.
actions.rulesText: Target player cannot play an Epoch this turn.

actions.name: Soft Reset
actions.effectText: Target player discards 2 cards, draws 2.
actions.rulesText: Target player discards 2 cards, draws 2.

actions.name: Curated Theft
actions.effectText: Look at a hand, take 1, give 1.
actions.rulesText: Look at a hand, take 1, give 1.

actions.name: Muse Snatch
actions.effectText: Steal 1 tableau Artist.
actions.rulesText: Steal 1 tableau Artist.

actions.name: Inspired Exchange
actions.effectText: Reveal 3 Artists, keep 1, give 1, discard 1.
actions.rulesText: Reveal 3 Artists, keep 1, give 1, discard 1.

actions.name: Tableau Shift
actions.effectText: Swap tableau Artists (same Epoch).
actions.rulesText: Swap tableau Artists (same Epoch).

actions.name: Opportunist
actions.effectText: Take last played Artist (if compatible).
actions.rulesText: Take last played Artist (if compatible).

actions.name: Parallel Canvas
actions.effectText: Swap tableau Artist with hand, draw 1.
actions.rulesText: Swap tableau Artist with hand, draw 1.

actions.name: Strategic Redraw
actions.effectText: Return 1 tableau Artist, draw 2.
actions.rulesText: Return 1 tableau Artist, draw 2.

actions.name: Masterpiece Draft
actions.effectText: Reveal 3, keep 1, give 1, discard 1.
actions.rulesText: Reveal 3, keep 1, give 1, discard 1.

actions.name: Steal the Spotlight
actions.effectText: Steal 1 Artist from hand.
actions.rulesText: Steal 1 Artist from hand.

actions.name: Creative Block (Reworked)
actions.effectText: Take random card, give 1.
actions.rulesText: Take random card, give 1.

actions.name: Time Thief
actions.effectText: Steal 1 Epoch and play if possible.
actions.rulesText: Steal 1 Epoch and play if possible.

actions.name: Era Swap
actions.effectText: Draw 3 Epochs, keep 1.
actions.rulesText: Draw 3 Epochs, keep 1.

actions.name: Shared Leverage
actions.effectText: Both reveal 1 Artist, you decide swap.
actions.rulesText: Both reveal 1 Artist, you decide swap.

actions.name: Precision Theft
actions.effectText: Take 1 Artist matching your tableau.
actions.rulesText: Take 1 Artist matching your tableau.

actions.rulesText: All players may draw 2 Artists.

rules.title: Game Overview
rules.bodyMarkdown: Xanadu: Muses of Inspiration is a creative card-driven strategy game for 2-9 players. Players become Muses, collect Epoch and Artist cards, and use Action cards to alter the flow of play.

rules.title: Game Components
rules.bodyMarkdown: The core deck contains 9 Muse cards, 90 Epoch cards, 150 Artist cards, 64 Action cards, and a die.

rules.title: Setup
rules.bodyMarkdown: Separate Muse, Epoch, Artist, and Action cards. Display Muses face up. Shuffle Artist, Epoch, and Action decks separately. Deal each player 5 Artists, 5 Epochs, and 3 Actions.

rules.title: Muse Selection
rules.bodyMarkdown: Each player rolls a die. Players choose one unique Muse in order from highest roll to lowest roll.

rules.title: Turn Flow
rules.bodyMarkdown: Draw 1 Action. If it says Play Immediately, resolve it and end your turn. Otherwise, optionally play 1 Action, then play an Epoch + Artist or add an Artist to an existing matching Epoch. Refill Action hand to minimum 3 and pass clockwise.

rules.title: Tableau Rules
rules.bodyMarkdown: Epochs cannot be placed alone. Artists must match the Epoch they are played to. Multiple Artists can be attached to the same Epoch. Only 1 Artist may be placed per turn unless an Action changes that limit.

rules.title: Scoring
rules.bodyMarkdown: Each Artist has a value for all nine Muses. A player score is the sum of each tableau Artist value for that player’s Muse.

rules.title: End Game
rules.bodyMarkdown: For 2-3 players, the game ends when a player reaches 5 Epochs or the Action deck is empty. For 4-9 players, the game ends when a player reaches 4 Epochs or the Action deck is empty.

rules.title: Tie Breaker
rules.bodyMarkdown: Each tied player draws an Artist card. The player whose drawn Artist has the highest value for their Muse wins. Repeat until the tie is resolved.

glossary.definition: The act of distributing cards to players at the start of the game or round.
To remove a card from play or hand and place it in the relevant discard pile.
To take a card from a deck into your hand.
The cards a player holds and can play from during their turn.
A complete cycle in which each player has taken a turn.
A valid Epoch and one or more matching Artists placed in a player’s tableau.
Cards a player has placed face-up in front of them on the table.
A single player’s sequence of actions before play passes clockwise.
